objective:
Objectif de stratégie de trading :
[Momentum] sur [0GUSDC en 1h]. Indicateurs : AROON + MACD. Entrées : Relative Strength Index (RSI) >80/EMA(5). Sorties : RSI <30/EMA(20). Risk management : Stop Loss à -5%/-2%. Hypothèse testable et falsifiable : Utiliser la combinaison des filtres AROON + MACD pour repérer les moments de transition du marché, en particulier lorsque le RSI dépasse 80 ou baisse sous 30. L'objectif est de capturer ces transitions en profitant aux points bas et hauts dans la volatilité du marché.

pre_reflection.text:
[Pre-reflection] This strategy uses momentum indicators, Bollinger Bands and ATR to identify market trends. The hypothesis is that these factors combined with the RSI will generate more reliable buy/sell signals. Potential weaknesses include potential overfitting due to the combination of multiple factors, a limited history period for backtesting which may not capture all possible market conditions, and the possibility of a single factor failing to confirm the trend leading to poor performance. If results are poor (negative return), I would try adjusting parameters such as moving averages or ATR band width, or trying different combinations of indicators, if available.
[Backup plan] If this strategy fails, alternative approaches could include using other technical indicators, fundamental analysis, or a machine learning model trained on historical data. Additionally, more extensive backtesting with larger and more diverse datasets can be performed to improve the robustness of the strategy.

pre_reflection.text: [Pre-reflection] The strategy is based on momentum indicators AROON and MACD along with Relative Strength Index(RSI) to identify market trends. It uses RSI values greater than 80 or EMA(5) as entry signals, while using RSI less than 30 or EMA(20) as exit signals. Entry long is allowed if momentum is confirmed and risk controlled. Exit occurs on signal reversal or momentum invalidation. The fallback contract will be determined by rsi, ema and atr indicators. If results are poor (negative return), the parameters can be adjusted to improve performance such as adjusting stop loss percentage/-2% to -3%. For mediocre Sharpe ratio, parameter adjustments like changing filters or adding other indicators could be considered to enhance returns.

pre_reflection.text:
[Pre-reflection] This strategy uses momentum indicators, Bollinger Bands and ATR to identify market trends. The hypothesis is that these factors combined with the RSI will generate more reliable buy/sell signals. Potential weaknesses include potential overfitting due to the combination of multiple factors, a limited history period for backtesting which may not capture all possible market conditions, and the possibility of a single factor failing to confirm the trend leading to poor performance. If results are poor (negative return), I would try adjusting parameters such as moving averages or ATR band width, or trying different combinations of indicators, if available.
[Backup plan] If this strategy fails, alternative approaches could include using other technical indicators, fundamental analysis, or a machine learning model trained on historical data. Additionally, more extensive backtesting with larger and more diverse datasets can be performed to improve the robustness of the strategy.
